summary: Ceremony Stage Notifications & Freelancer Milestone Escrow Template Testing - Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All UI components verified working including template selector, freelancer escrow detail view, and pricing page.

minor.issue: Timeout on one test (60s) - ceremony execution takes longer due to GPT-5.2 calls. Other ceremony execution tests passed.

test_credentials.note: Admin bypasses feature gates for escrow/ceremony endpoints

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed escrows during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ceremony stage notifications and freelancer escrow template fully tested. Ceremony execution creates 5 stage notifications (verifier, witness, sealer, consensus, blockchain_seal). Freelancer template has 5 conditions with payment splits: kickoff 10%, milestone_1 25%, review_1 0%, milestone_2 25%, final_delivery 40%. Templates endpoint returns both real_estate (6 milestones) and freelancer (5 milestones).
